review_body_text: Fun place to work, always new thing to learn. Gòod staff benefityes, annual leave, medical benefityes, bonus, good place go gain good experience on the banking line.

To fit in this company, you must prepare your mind and soul to expect the worst. And to get well paid yearly increment and bonus, you must do the norm which is exceeding your daily job and your boss expectation. If you got into Group Tech, you can get the most top technology experiences. But in order to gain this precious experiences and new skills, you must not expect work life balance.
pros_text: Become the most wanted candidate for other bank that competes with Maybank

review_title: Fast-paced, good place to start career.
review_body_text: A good place for resh graduates to start a career. Salary offer is competitive wth current market. Fast-paces environment, which bring lot exposure to a working environment.

review_title: Not the department i hoped for
review_body_text: Cant choose the department u got into. I dont want this to be my career path so i gotta find something else in the mean time. However, its a great exposure to how the real working life is. Lots of old people working.

No work-life balance but best place to learn a new thing. You can unlock your multitask skill here. Management is good but culture is not so good. Always need to do extra work that not include on your jobscopes. The hardest part is, need to do sale but if your love to do sale, this is the best company for you. Don't forget to unlock your multitask skill here.

A moderately fast-paced work setting. Some tasks may still require manual work as the company environment does not allow you to do much on their computer. Overall, it is a good place to start off your career. You will learn a lot throughout the journey.
Had a wonderful opportunity to learn from all My helpful teammates that provided very helpful guidance and never hesitated to guide in any situations

review_title: Good bank if youre looking for experiences
review_body_text: Good benefit if holding non-sales position, vice versa. For sales position, please find good location and big branch with sales manager and senior with same position available in branch
High responsibilities Learning new things Thinking out of box Experiencing handling foreign bankers Working hours is very sufficient Many benefits were offered to staff

Nothing much to do because it was pandemic period and it was also towards end of the year when colleagues were starting to clear their leaves, and a few caught covid and everyone had to self-quarantine at home. In the end the work i was given to do were mostly boring admin work, even when you ask other colleagues for work they said they had nothing for me. Couldn’t learn much from anyone. But everyone was generally nice and friendly.

review_title: Fun teammates but quite loaded work tasks
review_body_text: I worked as a protégé trainee here, as for the salary I must say that it is quite not compatible for the workloads but overall the it is acceptable because of the nice surroundings and good colleagues. But it's a fun experience working here!
You will be well compensated if you excel at work however does not take away the fact that you will undergo terrible stress because of poor management and process flow set by the company.
From my own experience, most of the staff stays because of the benefits offered by the company i.e medical & hospitalisation, leaves, commissions & incentives
Working as an intern, the managers are very busy with their own tasks but also willing to teach, with patient and humble. Overall a good place to learn as intern.

review_title: Rewards awarded base on performance and target achieve
review_body_text: Is a very established company ,with humanising care to their staff. You can count on it if you want build career path, Maybank has it own methodology upgrade their employees.
job_title: Head of Support service /Chief Cash Officer
pros_text: During MCO food provided by co's

review_body_text: Pros: • Good training provided • Healthcare benefit is ok • Easy to apply leave if you meet target • Typical working in a bank perks Cons: • Typical challenges faced by people in sales • Some colleagues are masters of taichi • Incentive is paid after 2 months to reduce turnover rate • Very high turnover rate

It’s easy and fun job as you just need to attend customer enquiries about Maybank related products and banking procedures. Maybank also provides excellent insurance coverage for you, spouse and children. =D
A very easy atmosphere to learn something new. The management and staff are very caring employees like their own family. A work culture that respects each other. Work in 7 working days.
You'll learn fast in terms of banking knowledge, management skills and interpersonal skills because of the projects, people and guidance you get from working here.
pros_text: Lots of career knowledge and exposure to new challenges

review_body_text: has a work environment and culture that tends to be flexible and relaxed, making new employees feel comfortable and easy to adjust to the environment. being one of the best multinational companies, I think already has a very, very good reputation.
